permuteDE 0.2.1
  • Tutorial
  • Functions
  • permuteDE on GitHub

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

permuteDE 0.2.1

  • Users can return results for all covariates in complex model designs

permuteDE 0.2.0

  • Created tests for all functions
  • Added compatibility with complex designs correcting for covariates
  • Improved overall compatibility across DE methods/tests and input object types

permuteDE 0.1.1

  • BPCells compatibility
  • Minor plotting changes

permuteDE 0.1.0

  • Created package
  • Added functions: countCombinations(), getCombinations(), getPseudobulk(), permuteDE(), permuteDEpalette(), permuteDEtheme(), plotDimReduction(), plotFeature(), plotHistogram(), plotVolcano(), runDE()
  • Added sample dataset sample_data and tutorial
  • Added pkgdown files

On this page

Developed by Cathrine Sant, James Guo.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
